ordinal_self_stamp_basis: Three thematic axes (security R5 / m5+roadmap evolution / interp-quirk + falsifier audit) each compressed into commits within a single linear plane; ordinal ω·3 reflects 3-fold repetition of the basic ω-stride (one commit-group per evolution arc) without ε_0-style nesting. Stamp held flat below ε_0.
rule: raw:commit-grouping-omega-cycle (raw 73 minimal grouping + raw 71 conservative — never -A/-., always specific files; raw 77 audit-append-only — no force-push, no amend).
subject: Group post-context working-tree changes (R5 OPT-D security, M5 BNF augment, dashboard honesty-6, roadmap-r4 SCC port, B1-fix sweep across 17 .hexa tools, falsifiers F113/F125 cleanup) into 6 self-contained thematic commits. NB: user-supplied context git-status snapshot was stale — described items (m5_ordinal*.py, r4_replan*.py, m3_anchor_*, design corpus, original B1+B2 atlas-ingest fix) had already been committed in dd147a165 + b99adc958 by background ω-cycle agents BEFORE this run started. This run committed the NEXT layer of evolution surfaced after those merges.

preflight.stale_context_observation: user-described untracked items already absorbed in commits dd147a165 (omega-cycles parallel meta+roadmap+cross witnesses + design corpus, 49 files) and b99adc958 (E2E SECURITY_AUDIT 7/7 PASS + honesty triad refresh + registry quality audit v2). Real working tree at run start contained an evolution layer NOT mentioned in context — handled per spirit of brief (group thematically, ≤7 commits, conservative, witness path on success).
preflight.test_artifact_avoidance: earlier transient state contained F999 'r5-test-temp' + F998 'r5-test-temp-2' falsifier entries (own .fix='remove after test', cmd_sha256='deadbeefdeadbeef'/'feedfacefeedface'). Background agent self-cleaned before commit grouping started — no test artifacts entered any commit in this group.

axes_acted.name: security_r5_optd_chain
axes_acted.summary: Hash-chained rotation ledger (R5 OPT-D primary, shipped) closes coordinated registry+baseline+ledger mutation gap from §4 SECURITY_AUDIT.md; OPT-B SSH-key signature stub ready (skip-by-default). New tools tool/ledger_verify.sh + tool/registry_sign.sh, hook .githooks/pre-commit emits prev_hash, audit §8 appended.

commits.subject: feat(security-r5-optd): hash-chained ledger + ledger_verify + registry_sign stub

axes_acted.name: m5_bnf_augment_round
axes_acted.summary: BNF text-doc closes spec-vs-impl drift surfaced in m5_i1i2 code emission cycle l4 — adds SC5 trailing-nat + SC6 bare-tower + EX1-3 corpus anchors; sha256 propagated into 2 upstream witnesses; parser test green corpus=50 fuzzer=10.

commits.subject: feat(m5-bnf): SC5 trailing-nat + SC6 bare-tower + corpus-anchored EX1-3

axes_acted.name: honesty_dashboard_extension
axes_acted.summary: atlas_cross_repo_dashboard.sh adds 6th honesty precondition (f) — 8 canonical defense-doc paths; --legacy-5 backward-compat. nexus 6/6 + anima 6/6, n6-arch 5/6 (gap), hexa-lang 5/6 (OPT-A ceiling). Witness raw 73/66/80/71.

axes_acted.name: roadmap_r4_scc_port
axes_acted.summary: tool/roadmap_engine.hexa adds Tarjan SCC + _vstar_super so soft_dep cycles (diamond) collapse to super-node. Closes T*=40m vs T*=60m discrepancy that r4.i5 benchmark surfaced. Sibling deepening ω+2 of parent r4_impl.

commits.subject: feat(roadmap-r4-port): SCC-contracted V*(n) for soft-dep cycles

axes_acted.name: b1_fix_sweep_17_hexa
axes_acted.summary: Mechanical sweep across 17 .hexa tools — flatten nested 'if in_str { if c==\\ ... continue }' to 'if in_str && c==\\ ...' / 'if in_str ...' (interpreter quirk where nested-if + continue mis-jumps). 93 ins / 92 del semantic-equivalent. Companion to prior B1 selftest fix in b99adc958.

axes_acted.name: falsifiers_quality_audit_followup
axes_acted.summary: F113 grade-token regex extended through L10/L11/L_ω + ::foundations [11*PASS_LITERATURE] (closes silent grade-downgrade gap); F125 abstraction_ceiling.md whole-doc sha256 master seal (raw 73 OPT-C — keeps F6/F7/F8 facet anchors, adds non-marker-edit coverage). atlas_health_timeline.jsonl appends 105-total snapshot (103 CLEAN + 2 HIT).

commits.subject: feat(falsifiers): F113 regex tighten + F125 doc-hash master seal

decisions.action: 6 thematic commits emitted (within 5-7 brief, judgment-split from suggested 6 to keep B1-fix sweep separate from r4 port — different lifecycles even though both touch tool/*.hexa)
include SECURITY_AUDIT.md §8 + R5 witness with hook+tools — single coherent unit
include 2 upstream witness sha256 propagations alongside BNF text — they are causally locked
include cross_repo_dashboard.md regen alongside dashboard.sh — generated artifact tracks generator
split B1-fix sweep from k4 r4 port — sweep is uniform mechanical fix unrelated to SCC algorithm work
atlas_health_timeline.jsonl bundled with falsifiers.jsonl — same falsifier_health audit context

fixpoint_marker: all 6 commits landed cleanly; pre-commit hook fired only on k6 (registry in staged set), no rotation occurred (baseline matched), no hook warnings emitted. Concurrent background agent emitted a redundant ω-cycle commit 0ea84fd3 (touches only harness/roadmap_slots.json with a giant message describing the same R5/F113/F125/(f) work this run already absorbed into k1+k3+k6) AND racily removed the working-tree .githooks directory — restored from HEAD by 'git checkout HEAD -- .githooks/pre-commit'. main now 75 commits ahead of origin/main (68 prior + 6 from this run + 1 from concurrent agent).
